```{r}
install.packages(patchwork)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(broom)
library(purrr)
library(MASS)   # stepAIC, glm.nb
library(car)    # vif
```

```{r}
df <- read_xlsx("cas_data.xlsx")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    coverage   = factor(coverage),
    holdout    = as.logical(holdout),
    risk_tier  = factor(risk_tier),
    class      = factor(class),
    study      = factor(study),
    greek      = factor(greek),
    off_campus = factor(off_campus),
    sprinklered = factor(sprinklered),
    amount     = as.numeric(amount),
    distance_to_campus = as.numeric(distance_to_campus)
  )
```

```{r}
# 构造 distance 分箱（按分位数）
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    log_distance = log(distance_to_campus + 1),
    
    distance_bin = case_when(
      distance_to_campus == 0 ~ "On campus",
      distance_to_campus > 0  ~ as.character(
        cut(
          distance_to_campus,
          breaks = quantile(
            distance_to_campus[distance_to_campus > 0],
            probs = c(0, .33, .66, 1),
            na.rm = TRUE
          ),
          include.lowest = TRUE
        )
      ),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    distance_bin = factor(distance_bin)
  )
```

```{r}
# 只保留 severity 数据
sev_data <- df %>% filter(amount > 0)

train <- sev_data %>% filter(holdout == FALSE)
test  <- sev_data %>% filter(holdout == TRUE)
```

```{r}
############################ EDA ###############################3
train %>%
  group_by(coverage) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_amount = mean(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_amount = median(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    p90 = quantile(amount, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    p99 = quantile(amount, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
```
```{r}
ggplot(train, aes(x = greek, y = amount)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Severity (amount) by greek across coverages")

ggplot(train, aes(x = off_campus, y = amount)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Severity (amount) by off_campus across coverages")

ggplot(train, aes(x = sprinklered, y = amount)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Severity (amount) by sprinklered across coverages")

ggplot(train, aes(x = risk_tier, y = amount)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Severity (amount) by risk_tier across coverages")

# distance不适合作为变量
ggplot(train, aes(x = distance_to_campus, y = amount)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Severity vs distance_to_campus (train)")

ggplot(train, aes(x = log_distance, y = amount)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Severity vs log_distance (train)")
```



```{r}
###################### full model #######################
models_full <- list()

for (cv in levels(train$coverage)) {

  dcv <- train %>% filter(coverage == cv)

  if (nrow(dcv) < 50) next  # 样本太少就跳过

  fit_full <- glm(
    amount ~ risk_tier + sprinklered + off_campus + greek + log_distance,
    family = Gamma(link = "log"),
    data = dcv
  )

  models_full[[cv]] <- fit_full

  cat("\n====== Coverage:", cv, "======\n")
  print(summary(fit_full))
}
```

```{r}
######################## check assumptions ########################
p_scatter  <- list()
p_smooth   <- list()
p_hist     <- list()
p_qq       <- list()

for (cv in names(models_full)) {

  fit <- models_full[[cv]]

  res_df <- data.frame(
    fitted = fitted(fit),
    resid  = residuals(fit, type = "deviance")
  )

  # 1) Residuals vs Fitted (scatter)
  p_scatter[[cv]] <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Residuals vs Fitted:", cv),
      x = "Fitted",
      y = "Deviance residual"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))

  # 2) Residuals vs Fitted (with smooth)
  p_smooth[[cv]] <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Residual trend:", cv),
      x = "Fitted",
      y = "Deviance residual"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))

  # 3) Histogram of residuals
  p_hist[[cv]] <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = resid)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "grey", color = "white") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Residual distribution:", cv),
      x = "Deviance residual",
      y = "Count"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))

  # 4) QQ plot (ggplot-friendly)
  qq_df <- data.frame(
    theoretical = qqnorm(res_df$resid, plot.it = FALSE)$x,
    sample      = qqnorm(res_df$resid, plot.it = FALSE)$y
  )

  p_qq[[cv]] <- ggplot(qq_df, aes(x = theoretical, y = sample)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("QQ plot:", cv),
      x = "Theoretical quantiles",
      y = "Sample quantiles"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
}

wrap_plots(p_scatter, ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(p_smooth,  ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(p_hist,    ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(p_qq,      ncol = 2)
```
```{r}
# 去掉distance bin
models_nodist <- list()

for (cv in levels(train$coverage)) {

  dcv <- train %>%
    filter(coverage == cv) %>%
    droplevels()

  if (nrow(dcv) < 50) next  # 样本太少就跳过

  fit_nodist <- glm(
    amount ~ risk_tier + sprinklered + off_campus + greek,
    family = Gamma(link = "log"),
    data = dcv
  )

  models_nodist[[cv]] <- fit_nodist

  cat("\n====== Coverage:", cv, "(No distance) ======\n")
  print(summary(fit_nodist))
}
```

```{r}
######################## check assumptions ########################
p_scatter  <- list()
p_smooth   <- list()
p_hist     <- list()
p_qq       <- list()

for (cv in names(models_nodist)) {

  fit <- models_nodist[[cv]]

  res_df <- data.frame(
    fitted = fitted(fit),
    resid  = residuals(fit, type = "deviance")
  )

  # 1) Residuals vs Fitted (scatter)
  p_scatter[[cv]] <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Residuals vs Fitted:", cv),
      x = "Fitted",
      y = "Deviance residual"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))

  # 2) Residuals vs Fitted (with smooth)
  p_smooth[[cv]] <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Residual trend:", cv),
      x = "Fitted",
      y = "Deviance residual"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))

  # 3) Histogram of residuals
  p_hist[[cv]] <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = resid)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "grey", color = "white") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Residual distribution:", cv),
      x = "Deviance residual",
      y = "Count"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))

  # 4) QQ plot (ggplot-friendly)
  qq_df <- data.frame(
    theoretical = qqnorm(res_df$resid, plot.it = FALSE)$x,
    sample      = qqnorm(res_df$resid, plot.it = FALSE)$y
  )

  p_qq[[cv]] <- ggplot(qq_df, aes(x = theoretical, y = sample)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("QQ plot:", cv),
      x = "Theoretical quantiles",
      y = "Sample quantiles"
    ) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
}

wrap_plots(p_scatter, ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(p_smooth,  ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(p_hist,    ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(p_qq,      ncol = 2)
```



```{r}
model_compare <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(models_full), function(cv) {

    full <- models_full[[cv]]
    reduced  <- models_nodist[[cv]]

    tibble(
      coverage = cv,

      # AIC
      AIC_full    = AIC(full),
      AIC_reduced = AIC(reduced),

      # Residual deviance
      dev_full    = deviance(full),
      dev_reduced = deviance(reduced),

      # Dispersion (Gamma φ)
      phi_full    = summary(full)$dispersion,
      phi_reduced = summary(reduced)$dispersion
    )
  })
)

model_compare
```
```{r}
#########对liability的测试##############
fit_liab_full <- models_nodist[["Liability"]]

fit_liab_norisk <- glm(
  amount ~ sprinklered + off_campus + greek,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = train %>% filter(coverage == "Liability")
)

AIC(fit_liab_full, fit_liab_norisk)


fit_liab_min <- glm(
  amount ~ off_campus + greek,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = train %>% filter(coverage == "Liability")
)

AIC(fit_liab_norisk, fit_liab_min) #要不要删？？？
```

```{r}
##################预测值##########################

df_sev_pred <- df %>%
  mutate(sev_pred = NA_real_)

for (cv in names(models_nodist)) {
  fit <- models_nodist[[cv]]
  idx <- df_sev_pred$coverage == cv
  df_sev_pred$sev_pred[idx] <- predict(fit, newdata = df_sev_pred[idx, ], type = "response")
}

# df_sev_pred$sev_pred
```

```{r}
relativity <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(models_nodist), function(cv) {
    tidy(models_nodist[[cv]]) %>%
      mutate(
        coverage = cv,
        relativity = exp(estimate),
        lower = exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error),
        upper = exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(coverage, term, estimate, std.error, p.value, relativity, lower, upper)
  })
)

relativity
```

```{r}
####################### validation #######################
test_sev <- df %>%
  filter(holdout == TRUE, amount > 0) %>%
  mutate(sev_pred = NA_real_)

for (cv in names(models_nodist)) {

  idx <- test_sev$coverage == cv

  if (sum(idx) == 0) next

  test_sev$sev_pred[idx] <- predict(
    models_nodist[[cv]],
    newdata = test_sev[idx, ],
    type = "response"
  )
}

ggplot(test_sev, aes(x = sev_pred, y = amount)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Actual vs Predicted Severity (Test Set)",
    x = "Predicted Severity",
    y = "Actual Severity"
  )

test_sev <- test_sev %>%
  mutate(sev_bucket = ntile(sev_pred, 5))
bucket_summary <- test_sev %>%
  group_by(sev_bucket) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_actual = mean(amount),
    avg_pred   = mean(sev_pred),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

bucket_summary

ggplot(bucket_summary, aes(x = sev_bucket)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = avg_actual, color = "Actual"), linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_line(aes(y = avg_pred,   color = "Predicted"), linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "black", "Predicted" = "steelblue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Severity Model Validation (Test Set)",
    x = "Predicted Severity Bucket",
    y = "Average Severity",
    color = ""
  )

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Matrix)
library(xgboost)

# ---- severity 数据
df_sev <- df %>% filter(!is.na(amount), amount > 0)

# ---- 全局 holdout split（不要再叫 train/test，避免后面被覆盖）
train_all <- df_sev %>% filter(holdout == FALSE)
test_all  <- df_sev %>% filter(holdout == TRUE)

drop_cols <- c("name","claim_id","amount","study","gender","gpa","class")  # 统一一次

coverages <- levels(df_sev$coverage)

models_gbm <- list()
all_test_pred <- list()

for (cov in coverages) {

  cat("\n==============================\n")
  cat("Coverage:", cov, "\n")
  cat("==============================\n")

  dcv <- df_sev %>% filter(coverage == cov) %>% droplevels()

  train_cv <- dcv %>% filter(holdout == FALSE)
  test_cv  <- dcv %>% filter(holdout == TRUE)

  if (nrow(train_cv) < 50 || nrow(test_cv) < 10) {
    cat("样本太少，跳过：train =", nrow(train_cv), "test =", nrow(test_cv), "\n")
    next
  }

  # ---- y
  y_train <- train_cv$amount
  y_test  <- test_cv$amount

  # ---- X (one-hot)
  x_train_df <- train_cv %>%
    dplyr::select(-any_of(drop_cols)) %>%
    dplyr::select(-coverage)

  x_test_df <- test_cv %>%
    dplyr::select(-any_of(drop_cols)) %>%
    dplyr::select(-coverage)

  # 如果有 NA，先简单处理（推荐：类别 NA -> "Missing"，数值 NA -> median）
  # 这里先最简单：drop NA（确保不会行数对不上）
  keep_train <- complete.cases(x_train_df)
  keep_test  <- complete.cases(x_test_df)

  x_train_df <- x_train_df[keep_train, , drop = FALSE]
  y_train    <- y_train[keep_train]

  x_test_df <- x_test_df[keep_test, , drop = FALSE]
  y_test    <- y_test[keep_test]
  test_cv   <- test_cv[keep_test, , drop = FALSE]

  X_train <- sparse.model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = x_train_df)
  X_test  <- sparse.model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = x_test_df)

  dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_train, label = y_train)
  dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_test,  label = y_test)

  fit <- xgb.train(
    params = list(
      objective = "reg:gamma",
      eta = 0.05,
      max_depth = 4,
      min_child_weight = 5,
      subsample = 0.8,
      colsample_bytree = 0.8
    ),
    data = dtrain,
    nrounds = 300,
    verbose = 0
  )

  pred <- predict(fit, dtest)
  pred <- pmax(pred, 1e-6)

  test_cv <- test_cv %>% mutate(pred_gbm = pred)

  # coverage 内 decile 表
  K <- 10
  decile_tbl_cv <- test_cv %>%
    mutate(q = ntile(pred_gbm, K)) %>%
    group_by(q) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      pred_mean = mean(pred_gbm),
      obs_mean  = mean(amount),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  print(decile_tbl_cv)

  models_gbm[[cov]] <- fit
  all_test_pred[[cov]] <- test_cv
}

# ---- 合并所有 coverage 的 holdout 预测
test_gbm_all <- bind_rows(all_test_pred)

# ---- 汇总 decile 表（按 coverage 分组）
K <- 10
decile_tbl_all <- test_gbm_all %>%
  group_by(coverage) %>%
  mutate(q = ntile(pred_gbm, K)) %>%
  group_by(coverage, q) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    pred_mean = mean(pred_gbm),
    obs_mean  = mean(amount),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

decile_tbl_all

```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(nnet)

# -----------------------------
# 1) ANN (pure R) helper
# -----------------------------
fit_ann_severity_nnet <- function(train_df, test_df, feature_vars,
                                  size = 10, decay = 1e-3, maxit = 500) {

  fml <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(feature_vars, collapse = " + "), "- 1"))
  X_train <- model.matrix(fml, data = train_df)
  X_test  <- model.matrix(fml, data = test_df)

  # standardize using train only
  mu <- colMeans(X_train)
  sdv <- apply(X_train, 2, sd); sdv[sdv == 0] <- 1
  X_train <- scale(X_train, center = mu, scale = sdv)
  X_test  <- scale(X_test,  center = mu, scale = sdv)

  y_train <- log(train_df$amount)

  nn <- nnet(
    x = X_train, y = y_train,
    size = size, linout = TRUE,
    decay = decay, maxit = maxit,
    trace = FALSE
  )

  pred <- exp(as.numeric(predict(nn, X_test)))
  pmax(pred, 1e-6)
}

# -----------------------------
# 2) Make quantile table with FIXED bins
#    (so Actual line is identical across models)
# -----------------------------
make_quantile_tbl_fixedbin <- function(actual, pred, bin, model_name) {
  tibble(
    bin = bin,
    actual = actual,
    pred = pred
  ) %>%
    group_by(bin) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      actual_mean = mean(actual, na.rm = TRUE),
      pred_mean   = mean(pred,   na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(model = model_name)
}

# -----------------------------
# 3) Plot: color = model, linetype = Actual/Pred
# -----------------------------
plot_quantile_3models_fixedbin <- function(q_all, title) {

  q_long <- q_all %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(actual_mean, pred_mean),
      names_to = "series",
      values_to = "value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      series = dplyr::recode(
        series,
        actual_mean = "Actual",
        pred_mean   = "Predicted"
      ),
      lty = ifelse(series == "Actual", "solid", "dashed")
    )

  ggplot(q_long,
         aes(x = bin, y = value,
             color = model,
             linetype = lty,
             group = interaction(model, series))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_linetype_identity() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Reference quantile bin (by GBM prediction)",
      y = "Mean severity in bin",
      color = "Model",
      caption = "Solid = Actual mean (same bins for all models); Dashed = Predicted mean"
    )
}

# optional: calibration error (for choosing best)
qcal_error <- function(qdf) mean(abs(qdf$actual_mean - qdf$pred_mean))

# -----------------------------
# 4) Main: per coverage, compare GLM vs ANN vs GBM
#    using GBM bins as reference
# -----------------------------
feature_vars <- c("risk_tier","sprinklered","off_campus","greek","log_distance")

best_tbl <- tibble()

for (cov in sort(unique(train_all$coverage))) {

  # coverage-specific split
  d_train <- train_all %>% filter(coverage == cov)
  d_test  <- test_all  %>% filter(coverage == cov)

  # GBM holdout predictions (must include pred_gbm)
  d_test_gbm <- test_gbm_all %>% filter(coverage == cov)

  # need enough data
  if (nrow(d_train) < 50 || nrow(d_test) < 10 || nrow(d_test_gbm) < 10) next

  # IMPORTANT: ensure d_test and d_test_gbm are the SAME rows order/length
  # safest: join by claim_id if you have it; otherwise rely on same filtering pipeline
  # Here we align by row order if counts match; otherwise do a join if claim_id exists
  if (nrow(d_test) != nrow(d_test_gbm)) {
    if ("claim_id" %in% names(d_test) && "claim_id" %in% names(d_test_gbm)) {
      d_test <- d_test %>%
        inner_join(d_test_gbm %>% select(claim_id, pred_gbm), by = "claim_id")
      d_test_gbm <- d_test
    } else {
      cat("SKIP (cannot align test rows):", cov, "\n")
      next
    }
  } else {
    # bring pred_gbm into d_test
    d_test <- d_test %>% mutate(pred_gbm = d_test_gbm$pred_gbm)
  }

  # choose bins K
  K <- ifelse(nrow(d_test) < 120, 5, 10)

  # reference bins defined by GBM predictions
  ref_bin <- dplyr::ntile(d_test$pred_gbm, K)

  # ---- GLM
  fit_glm <- glm(
    amount ~ risk_tier + sprinklered + off_campus + greek + log_distance,
    family = Gamma(link = "log"),
    data = d_train
  )
  pred_glm <- pmax(predict(fit_glm, newdata = d_test, type = "response"), 1e-6)

  q_glm <- make_quantile_tbl_fixedbin(
    actual = d_test$amount,
    pred   = pred_glm,
    bin    = ref_bin,
    model_name = "GLM"
  )

  # ---- ANN
  pred_ann <- fit_ann_severity_nnet(d_train, d_test, feature_vars,
                                   size = 10, decay = 1e-3, maxit = 500)

  q_ann <- make_quantile_tbl_fixedbin(
    actual = d_test$amount,
    pred   = pred_ann,
    bin    = ref_bin,
    model_name = "ANN"
  )

  # ---- GBM
  q_gbm <- make_quantile_tbl_fixedbin(
    actual = d_test$amount,
    pred   = d_test$pred_gbm,
    bin    = ref_bin,
    model_name = "GBM"
  )

  # ---- plot (Actual lines will overlap now)
  q_all <- bind_rows(q_glm, q_ann, q_gbm)
  print(plot_quantile_3models_fixedbin(q_all, paste0(cov, " | 3-model calibration (K=", K, ")")))

  # ---- optional: best model by quantile calibration error
  e_glm <- qcal_error(q_glm)
  e_ann <- qcal_error(q_ann)
  e_gbm <- qcal_error(q_gbm)

  best_tbl <- bind_rows(
    best_tbl,
    tibble(
      coverage = as.character(cov),
      K = K,
      qerr_glm = e_glm,
      qerr_ann = e_ann,
      qerr_gbm = e_gbm,
      best = c("GLM","ANN","GBM")[which.min(c(e_glm, e_ann, e_gbm))]
    )
  )
}

best_tbl
```

```{r}
# quantile_compare <- function(actual, pred, K = 10) {
#   tibble(actual = actual, pred = pred) |>
#     mutate(bin = dplyr::ntile(pred, K)) |>
#     group_by(bin) |>
#     summarise(
#       pred_mean = mean(pred),
#       actual_mean = mean(actual),
#       n = n(),
#       .groups = "drop"
#     )
# }
# 
# plot_quantile_compare_multi <- function(df_list, title) {
#   df <- bind_rows(df_list)
# 
#   ggplot(df, aes(x = bin, group = model)) +
#     geom_line(aes(y = actual_mean)) +
#     geom_point(aes(y = actual_mean)) +
#     geom_line(aes(y = pred_mean), linetype = 2) +
#     geom_point(aes(y = pred_mean), shape = 1) +
#     theme_minimal() +
#     labs(
#       title = title,
#       x = "Predicted quantile bin (1=low, 10=high)",
#       y = "Mean in bin",
#       caption = "Solid = Actual mean; Dashed = Predicted mean"
#     )
# }
# 
# # Quantile 校准误差：用来“每个 coverage 选 best”
# qcal_error <- function(qdf) mean(abs(qdf$actual_mean - qdf$pred_mean))
```

```{r}
# fit_ann_severity_nnet <- function(train_df, test_df, feature_vars,
#                                   size = 10, decay = 1e-3, maxit = 500) {
# 
#   train_df <- dplyr::filter(train_df, amount > 0)
#   test_df  <- dplyr::filter(test_df,  amount > 0)
# 
#   fml <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(feature_vars, collapse = " + "), "- 1"))
#   X_train <- model.matrix(fml, data = train_df)
#   X_test  <- model.matrix(fml, data = test_df)
# 
#   # 标准化（只用 train）
#   mu <- colMeans(X_train)
#   sdv <- apply(X_train, 2, sd); sdv[sdv == 0] <- 1
#   X_train <- scale(X_train, center = mu, scale = sdv)
#   X_test  <- scale(X_test,  center = mu, scale = sdv)
# 
#   y_train <- log(train_df$amount)
# 
#   nn <- nnet(
#     x = X_train, y = y_train,
#     size = size, linout = TRUE,
#     decay = decay, maxit = maxit,
#     trace = FALSE
#   )
# 
#   pred_test <- exp(as.numeric(predict(nn, X_test)))
# 
#   list(
#     pred = pred_test,
#     actual = test_df$amount
#   )
# }
```

```{r}
# library(nnet)
# library(dplyr)
# library(ggplot2)

# quantile_compare <- function(actual, pred, K = 10) {
#   tibble(actual = actual, pred = pred) |>
#     mutate(bin = dplyr::ntile(pred, K)) |>
#     group_by(bin) |>
#     summarise(
#       pred_mean = mean(pred),
#       actual_mean = mean(actual),
#       n = n(),
#       .groups = "drop"
#     )
# }
# 
# plot_quantile_compare_multi <- function(df_list, title) {
#   df <- bind_rows(df_list)
# 
#   ggplot(df, aes(x = bin, group = model)) +
#     geom_line(aes(y = actual_mean)) +
#     geom_point(aes(y = actual_mean)) +
#     geom_line(aes(y = pred_mean), linetype = 2) +
#     geom_point(aes(y = pred_mean), shape = 1) +
#     theme_minimal() +
#     labs(
#       title = title,
#       x = "Predicted quantile bin (1=low, 10=high)",
#       y = "Mean in bin",
#       caption = "Solid = Actual mean; Dashed = Predicted mean"
#     )
# }
# 
# qcal_error <- function(qdf) mean(abs(qdf$actual_mean - qdf$pred_mean))

# fit_ann_severity_nnet <- function(train_df, test_df, feature_vars,
#                                   size = 10, decay = 1e-3, maxit = 500) {
# 
#   train_df <- dplyr::filter(train_df, amount > 0)
#   test_df  <- dplyr::filter(test_df,  amount > 0)
# 
#   fml <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(feature_vars, collapse = " + "), "- 1"))
#   X_train <- model.matrix(fml, data = train_df)
#   X_test  <- model.matrix(fml, data = test_df)
# 
#   mu <- colMeans(X_train)
#   sdv <- apply(X_train, 2, sd); sdv[sdv == 0] <- 1
#   X_train <- scale(X_train, center = mu, scale = sdv)
#   X_test  <- scale(X_test,  center = mu, scale = sdv)
# 
#   y_train <- log(train_df$amount)
# 
#   nn <- nnet(
#     x = X_train, y = y_train,
#     size = size, linout = TRUE,
#     decay = decay, maxit = maxit,
#     trace = FALSE
#   )
# 
#   pred_test <- exp(as.numeric(predict(nn, X_test)))
# 
#   list(pred = pred_test, actual = test_df$amount)
# }

# feature_vars <- c("risk_tier","sprinklered","off_campus","greek","log_distance")
# 
# best_by_coverage <- tibble()
# 
# for (cov in sort(unique(train_all$coverage))) {
# 
#   d_train <- train_all %>% filter(coverage == cov)
#   d_test  <- test_all  %>% filter(coverage == cov)
# 
#   # 样本太少就跳
#   if (nrow(d_train) < 80 || nrow(d_test) < 30) next
# 
#   # ---- GLM
#   fit_glm <- glm(
#     amount ~ risk_tier + sprinklered + off_campus + greek + log_distance,
#     family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#     data = d_train
#   )
# 
#   pred_glm <- predict(fit_glm, newdata = d_test, type = "response")
#   q_glm <- quantile_compare(d_test$amount, pred_glm, K = 10) %>%
#     mutate(model = "GLM")
#   err_glm <- qcal_error(q_glm)
# 
#   # ---- ANN (nnet)
#   ann_res <- fit_ann_severity_nnet(d_train, d_test, feature_vars,
#                                   size = 10, decay = 1e-3, maxit = 500)
# 
#   q_ann <- quantile_compare(ann_res$actual, ann_res$pred, K = 10) %>%
#     mutate(model = "ANN")
#   err_ann <- qcal_error(q_ann)
# 
#   # ---- plot
#   print(plot_quantile_compare_multi(
#     df_list = list(q_glm, q_ann),
#     title = paste0(cov, " | Quantile comparison (GLM vs ANN)")
#   ))
# 
#   best_by_coverage <- bind_rows(
#     best_by_coverage,
#     tibble(
#       coverage = as.character(cov),
#       qerr_glm = err_glm,
#       qerr_ann = err_ann,
#       best = ifelse(err_glm <= err_ann, "GLM", "ANN")
#     )
#   )
# }
# 
# best_by_coverage
```
